summary: Bug fix verification for ItemCalculator/MrpCalculator blank screen issue. The item select dropdown no longer causes blank screen. All fixes verified working: ErrorBoundary component, dataLoaded loading state, Select value prop fix (empty string -> undefined).

minor_warnings.issue: React warning: 'Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled'
minor_warnings.impact: No functional impact - component works correctly
minor_warnings.note: This is a React warning only, not causing any crashes or blank screens

passed_tests: ItemCalculator: Loading state 'Loading calculator...' displays briefly before form renders
ItemCalculator: Type selection step (Gold/Diamond) renders correctly
ItemCalculator: Purity selection (24KT, 22KT, etc.) works with rates displayed
ItemCalculator: Item Name dropdown opens WITHOUT causing blank screen (BUG FIXED)
ItemCalculator: Dropdown shows 5 options (Necklace, Ring, Bangle, Pendant, Earring)
ItemCalculator: Item selection from dropdown works correctly
ItemCalculator: Full flow works - Gold -> Normal -> 24KT -> Ring -> Weights -> Making charge
MrpCalculator: Item Name dropdown opens WITHOUT causing blank screen (BUG FIXED)
MrpCalculator: Form displays correctly with all fields
ErrorBoundary: Component exists with 'Something went wrong' UI
ErrorBoundary: Has Try Again button with data-testid='error-retry-button'
ErrorBoundary: Has Go Back button with data-testid='error-go-back-button'
ErrorBoundary: Wraps all Routes in App.js
ErrorBoundary: Extra wrapping on ItemCalculator and MrpCalculator routes
critical_code_review_comments: ErrorBoundary.js: Properly implemented class component with getDerivedStateFromError and componentDidCatch
App.js line 120-148: ErrorBoundary wraps all Routes, plus extra wrapping on ItemCalculator (lines 140-141) and MrpCalculator (lines 144-145)
ItemCalculator.js lines 300-307: Loading screen renders when !dataLoaded
ItemCalculator.js line 454: Select value uses 'itemName || undefined' to fix uncontrolled/controlled issue
MrpCalculator.js lines 87-94: Loading screen renders when !dataLoaded
MrpCalculator.js line 155: Select value uses 'itemName || undefined'

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

seed_data_creation: None - used existing bill (333a5013-3506-4f44-a4a1-cebc35456a14) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: Item select dropdown in ItemCalculator and MrpCalculator no longer causes blank screen. Fixes applied: 1) ErrorBoundary component wrapping routes, 2) dataLoaded loading state prevents form render until data loads, 3) Select value prop changed from empty string to undefined. Minor React warning about controlled/uncontrolled state exists but doesn't cause issues.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Item select dropdown in calculations page causes blank screen intermittently when opened during bill item creation/editing
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Select component received empty string as value which caused React to switch between controlled/uncontrolled state, potentially crashing the component
fixes_applied: Wrapped all Routes with ErrorBoundary in App.js
Added extra ErrorBoundary wrapping for ItemCalculator and MrpCalculator routes
Added dataLoaded state to prevent form rendering until API data loads
Changed Select value prop from empty string to undefined (itemName || undefined)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: BUG FIXED - No blank screen occurs when opening or interacting with Item Name dropdown in either ItemCalculator or MrpCalculator

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
